title: Spanish Bacalao Ceviche
description: A refreshing and flavorful ceviche dish made with cod, onions, peppers, and citrus juices.
instructions: Rinse the bacalao and soak it in water for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Drain the bacalao and cut it into small pieces.
Cut the maripaha and de into small pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the bacalao, maripaha, de, con, and ceviche.
Mix well and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional con if desired.
